recommendations.title: Revenge of the Ninja
recommendations.overview: A peaceful ex-ninja's life shatters when his son's kidnapping forces him back into violence amid an American-Japanese criminal drug war.

recommendations.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
recommendations.overview: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong investigates the disappearance of several marines, which leads him to The Lion, a super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

recommendations.title: American Ninja
recommendations.overview: Joe Armstrong, an orphaned drifter with little respect for much other than martial arts, finds himself on an American Army base in The Philippines after a judge gives him a choice of enlistment or prison. On one of his first missions driving a convoy

recommendations.title: Baki Hanma VS Kengan Ashura
recommendations.overview: It's the ultimate showdown. The toughest fighters from "Baki Hanma" and "Kengan Ashura" clash in this unprecedented, hard-hitting martial arts crossover.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Jungle
recommendations.overview: A martial arts instructor working at a police academy gets imprisoned after killing a man by accident. But when a vicious killer starts targeting martial arts masters, the instructor offers to help the police in return for his freedom.

recommendations.title: The Octagon
recommendations.overview: Scott James, a veteran martial arts expert, is recruited as the protector of the wealthy and beautiful Justine  after she becomes the target of a ninja clan. When Scott finds out that his ruthless arch-nemesis, McCarn , is involved with the stealthy

recommendations.title: Checkered Ninja
recommendations.overview: A possessed Ninja doll teams up with a teenage boy to avenge the murder of a poor child factory worker.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: The Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: A young man searches for the "master" to obtain the final level of martial arts mastery known as the glow. Along the way he must fight an evil martial arts expert and rescue a beautiful singer from an obsessed music promoter.

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: When a city is overrun with a demonically-possessed crowd, a cop must find the source of evil to save his family.
